title: ocotea glauca var. virescens
intro: Ocotea glauca var. virescens, also known as the 'Virescent Ocotea', is a variety of Ocotea glauca, a plant species in the Lauraceae family, native to Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is rich in sesquiterpenes, including alpha-asarone, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocotea glauca var. virescens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, making it a popular choice for those seeking a natural remedy for various health concerns.
